name: JULES S2 | VOODOO BOYS
description:
you made up and are together now. he wants to build a life with you. but healing isn't linear.



y'all like his new hairstyle? no more depresso jules hair, he's in his healing era. also if this is your first jules bot, please start at his first bot here. click jules for the link.

𝕔𝕙𝕒𝕣𝕒𝕔𝕥𝕖𝕣 : julian 'jules' harlow
𝕤𝕖𝕥𝕥𝕚𝕟𝕘 : new orleans, la
𝕤𝕖𝕣𝕚𝕖𝕤 : voodoo boys x bayou crew
𝕤𝕔𝕖𝕟𝕒𝕣𝕚𝕠: you and jules have been dating for a year now. he wants to go straight, build his mma career and build a life with you. he's getting better, working on his trauma but healing isn't linear.
𝕤𝕔𝕖𝕟𝕒𝕣𝕚𝕠 𝕘𝕦𝕚𝕕𝕒𝕟𝕔𝕖 : i would really advise you to copy something in chat memory about y'all being childhooddd friends and the history of it if he doesn't remember it. i put it in the personality but jllm gonna do what it do.




♥ ａｕｔｈｏｒ＇ｓ　ｎｏｔｅ ♥

whew this one was a joy to write but also took way more editing/time than i thought. i had to cut down on a lot. it was 2100 tokens originally. im sorry its angsty but i wanted to stay true that healing takes time. i will def make a fluff alt for him. if you're interested in the songs that i wrote jules to here they are. season 1 : how he felt with you as teens/kids before the 'abandonment' - song , how he is after you 'left him'- song , and season 2 how he feels now - song. anyways kane from bayou is crew is next! and as always, a smaller creator whose bots im really enjoying and are sooo hot. check out lady astra to navigate to the profile. and if you're interested in supporting me (itll just go to my image gen/edit/graphic subscriptions) (i'll eventually open comms) - you can stop by my kofi link ! please don't feel pressured to donate, this is a hobby for me so i just fund my subscriptions myself. and cause i know y'all will ask, i don't do dick pics for alts XD although i will redo lars for s2 because im better at making them now and he needs a new one : D


FYI:

𝘪 𝘶𝘴𝘦 𝘮𝘪𝘥𝘫𝘰𝘶𝘳𝘯𝘦𝘺 𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝘯𝘰𝘷𝘦𝘭𝘢𝘪 𝘵𝘰 𝘮𝘢𝘬𝘦 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘪𝘮𝘢𝘨𝘦𝘴 𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝘦𝘥𝘪𝘵 𝘪𝘯 𝘨𝘪𝘮𝘱. 𝘪 𝘩𝘢𝘷𝘦 𝘯𝘰 𝘳𝘦𝘢𝘭 𝘮𝘦𝘵𝘩𝘰𝘥, 𝘪 𝘫𝘶𝘴𝘵 𝘨𝘦𝘯 𝘢 𝘭𝘰𝘵 𝘰𝘧 𝘱𝘪𝘤𝘴. 𝘢𝘭𝘴𝘰 𝘴𝘰𝘳𝘳𝘺 𝘪𝘧 𝘣𝘰𝘵 𝘴𝘱𝘦𝘢𝘬𝘴 𝘧𝘰𝘳 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘰𝘳 𝘵𝘩𝘪𝘯𝘨𝘴 𝘭𝘪𝘬𝘦 𝘵𝘩𝘢𝘵. 𝘤𝘢𝘯'𝘵 𝘤𝘰𝘯𝘵𝘳𝘰𝘭 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘭𝘭𝘮. 𝘪 𝘥𝘰𝘯'𝘵 𝘸𝘳𝘪𝘵𝘦 𝘮𝘱𝘰𝘷. 𝘪 𝘸𝘪𝘭𝘭 𝘯𝘰𝘵 𝘤𝘩𝘢𝘯𝘨𝘦 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘱𝘰𝘷 𝘰𝘧 𝘢𝘯𝘺 𝘣𝘰𝘵𝘴. 𝘵𝘩𝘢𝘵 𝘣𝘦𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘴𝘢𝘪𝘥 𝘪 𝘥𝘰𝘯'𝘵 𝘤𝘢𝘳𝘦 𝘪𝘧 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘵𝘢𝘬𝘦 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘤𝘩𝘢𝘳 𝘥𝘦𝘧𝘴, 𝘦𝘥𝘪𝘵 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘪𝘯𝘵𝘳𝘰 𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝘮𝘢𝘬𝘦 𝘢 𝘱𝘳𝘪𝘷𝘢𝘵𝘦 𝘣𝘰𝘵 𝘧𝘰𝘳 𝘺𝘰𝘶𝘳𝘴𝘦𝘭𝘧! 𝘱𝘭𝘴 𝘥𝘰𝘯'𝘵 𝘵𝘦𝘭𝘭 𝘮𝘦 𝘢𝘣𝘰𝘶𝘵 𝘷𝘪𝘰𝘭𝘦𝘯𝘤𝘦 𝘭𝘪𝘬𝘦 𝘮𝘶𝘳𝘥𝘦𝘳 𝘢𝘨𝘢𝘪𝘯𝘴𝘵 𝘮𝘺 𝘣𝘰𝘵𝘴 𝘪𝘯 𝘳𝘦𝘷𝘪𝘦𝘸𝘴. 𝘪'𝘭𝘭 𝘫𝘶𝘴𝘵 𝘥𝘦𝘭𝘦𝘵𝘦 𝘪𝘵 𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝘣𝘭𝘰𝘤𝘬 𝘺𝘰𝘶.
